lineItems.description: Executive Director (1.0 FTE) — organizational leadership, fundraising, partnership development, strategic planning
lineItems.notes: Full-time salary; ED also serves as primary fundraiser and public representative

lineItems.description: Operations Manager (1.0 FTE) — day-to-day operations, HR, vendor management, program support
lineItems.notes: Full-time salary; manages organizational systems and supports all program areas

lineItems.description: Part-time Communications Coordinator — social media, newsletter, website updates, press
Payroll taxes and benefits — employer FICA, unemployment insurance, workers comp
lineItems.notes: ~7.5% of total payroll for employer-side taxes and statutory benefits

lineItems.description: Office and coworking space — dedicated desks or small office at 147 Front Street, Brooklyn
lineItems.notes: $800/month for coworking membership or small office lease

lineItems.description: General liability and directors & officers insurance
lineItems.notes: Annual premium for nonprofit GL and D&O coverage

lineItems.description: Accounting and bookkeeping — monthly bookkeeping, annual audit preparation, Form 990 filing
lineItems.notes: $500/month for outsourced nonprofit bookkeeping and annual tax filing

lineItems.description: Legal services — contract review, compliance, employment matters
lineItems.notes: Retainer or as-needed legal counsel; pro bono supplemented with paid hours

lineItems.description: Technology infrastructure — Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, GitHub, cloud hosting
lineItems.notes: $300/month for organizational SaaS stack (nonprofit discounts applied)

lineItems.description: Website hosting and domain — Netlify hosting, domain registration, SSL
lineItems.notes: Netlify free tier plus domain renewal and any premium features

lineItems.description: Hardware and IT — staff laptops, peripherals, repairs
lineItems.notes: Replacement and maintenance budget for staff equipment

lineItems.description: Brand and marketing — graphic design, content creation, social media management tools
lineItems.notes: $200/month for design tools (Canva Pro, Adobe), scheduling tools, and ad spend

lineItems.description: Email marketing platform — Mailchimp or SendGrid for newsletters and announcements
Professional development — staff training, conference attendance, skill building
lineItems.notes: $1,000 per FTE staff member for conferences, courses, or certifications

lineItems.description: Travel — local transportation, donor meetings, partner site visits
lineItems.notes: MetroCard, rideshare, and occasional regional travel for meetings

lineItems.description: Office supplies and printing — general supplies, printing, postage
lineItems.notes: Basic office supplies and printed materials

lineItems.description: Miscellaneous and contingency — unexpected expenses, small unbudgeted needs
lineItems.notes: 0.5% contingency reserve for unanticipated operational costs
